LSE-MS6-L4-1400P-MSSS6-SOC-NAV-02  |  MS Social Studies Grade 6  |  The U.S. Constitution and Federal Government

The Three-Drum Beat

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What is the girl mainly explaining about the three drums?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about why the girl says this song fits her Constitution project, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what she says about what each drum does and what the drums do to each other, and articulate the conclusion that follows about what this shows about the Constitution.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CA HSS 8.2  |  MS Social Studies Grade 6: The U.S. Constitution and Federal Government
